name: notebooklm-mcp
description: MCP server for Google NotebookLM — chat, source ingestion, audio overviews, citations, stdio + Streamable-HTTP transports.

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.check:desktop: node --check electron.cjs && node --check preload.cjs && node --check lib/desktop-app-info.cjs && node --check lib/desktop-settings.cjs && node --check lib/desktop-credential-store.cjs && node --check lib/notebook-log-manager.cjs && node --check lib/notebook-socket-hub.cjs && node --check lib/notebook-mcp-adapter.cjs && node --check lib/notebook-update-client.cjs && node --check lib/notebook-bridge-server.cjs && node --check lib/agent-tools.cjs && node --check lib/agent-chat.cjs && node --check renderer/renderer.js && node --check scripts/start-electron.cjs && node --check scripts/package-app.cjs && node --check scripts/smoke-desktop.cjs

author: Gérôme Dexheimer <hello@geromedexheimer.de> (https://github.com/PleasePrompto)
